article_title: Sunday Reaches Unicorn Status With $165M Series B to Deploy Household Robots by Thanksgiving

content_preview.title: Sunday Reaches Unicorn Status With $165M Series B to Deploy Household Robots by Thanksgiving
content_preview.summary: Mountain View startup Sunday has raised $165 million at a $1.15 billion valuation to bring its Memo household robot from demos to real-world deployment, with beta units heading to 50 homes by late 2026.
content_preview.body_excerpt: Sunday, a Mountain View startup building a general-purpose household robot, has closed a $165 million Series B round at a $1.15 billion valuation, crossing the unicorn threshold less than five months after [emerging from stealth](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/12/humanoid-robotics-maker-sunday-reaches-1-15b-valuation-to-build-household-robots/). Coatue Management led the round, with participation from Bain Capital Ventures, Fidelity Management & Research Company, Tiger Global, Benchmark, Convict...
